name: Cinnamon & Coriander Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the cinnamon stick and coriander for one week in a mixture of vodka and brandy.
2. Strain the mixture through cheesecloth to remove solids.
3. Add sugar syrup and stir until well combined.
4. Optionally, add 1 or 2 cloves, cardamom seeds, or lemon peel to taste. Adjust flavors as desired.
